name: shipstack-ai
description: ShipStack AI — Quinn-first drop shipping intelligence platform

scripts.env:check: node -e "const r=['QUINN_ENDPOINT','QUINN_BRIDGE_SECRET','ANTHROPIC_API_KEY','FALLBACK_ENABLED','FALLBACK_API_URL','FALLBACK_MODEL','APP_PRIMARY_PROFILE'];const m=r.filter(k=>!process.env[k]);if(m.length){console.error('[ERROR] Missing env vars:',m.join(', '));process.exit(1);}console.log('[OK] All required env vars present.')"
